Record Class FirearmStats

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
lucis.lux.hff.data.FirearmStats
Record Components:
reloadTime - Time in seconds required to reload the firearm.
rpm - Rounds per minute (rate of fire).
projectileVelocity - Velocity of the projectile when fired.
projectileAmount - Number of projectiles fired per shot (e.g., shotgun pellets).
projectileCapacity - Maximum number of projectiles the firearm can hold.
spreadBase - Base spread of projectiles (in degrees).
movementPenalty - Penalty to accuracy when moving.
misfireChance - Chance of the firearm misfiring (0.0 to 1.0).
jamChance - Chance of the firearm jamming (0.0 to 1.0).
verticalRecoil - Vertical recoil strength.
horizontalRecoil - Horizontal recoil strength.
firearmClass - Historical and mechanical classification of the firearm.
firearmType - Functional type of the firearm (e.g., handgun, rifle).
fireMode - Firing mode of the firearm (e.g., semi-automatic, automatic).
disabled - Whether the HFF mechanics are disabled.
calibre - The calibre of the ammunition used by the firearm.
public record FirearmStats(float reloadTime, float rpm, float projectileVelocity, int projectileAmount, int projectileCapacity, float spreadBase, float movementPenalty, float misfireChance, float jamChance, float verticalRecoil, float horizontalRecoil, FirearmClass firearmClass, FirearmType firearmType, FireMode fireMode, boolean disabled, String calibre) extends Record
The FirearmStats record represents the statistics and properties of a firearm. This record stores all relevant data for firearm behaviour, such as rate of fire, projectile velocity, recoil, and supported ammunition types.

This record is immutable and provides a convenient way to store and retrieve firearm statistics. It is typically used in conjunction with firearm components to define the properties and behaviour of firearms in the HFF (Hytale Firearm Framework) plugin.

Example usage:

     FirearmStats stats = FirearmStats.builder()
         .reloadTime(2.5f)
         .rpm(600.0f)
         .projectileVelocity(300.0f)
         .projectileAmount(1)
         .projectileCapacity(30)
         .spreadBase(2.0f)
         .movementPenalty(0.5f)
         .misfireChance(0.01f)
         .jamChance(0.005f)
         .verticalRecoil(0.5f)
         .horizontalRecoil(0.1f)
         .firearmClass(FirearmClass.PISTOL)
         .firearmType(FirearmType.HANDGUN)
         .fireMode(FireMode.SEMI_AUTOMATIC)
         .disabled(false)
         .calibre("9mm")
         .build();

  • Constructor Details

    • FirearmStats

      public FirearmStats(float reloadTime, float rpm, float projectileVelocity, int projectileAmount, int projectileCapacity, float spreadBase, float movementPenalty, float misfireChance, float jamChance, float verticalRecoil, float horizontalRecoil, FirearmClass firearmClass, FirearmType firearmType, FireMode fireMode, boolean disabled, String calibre)
      Creates an instance of a FirearmStats record class.
      Parameters:
      reloadTime - the value for the reloadTime record component
      rpm - the value for the rpm record component
      projectileVelocity - the value for the projectileVelocity record component
      projectileAmount - the value for the projectileAmount record component
      projectileCapacity - the value for the projectileCapacity record component
      spreadBase - the value for the spreadBase record component
      movementPenalty - the value for the movementPenalty record component
      misfireChance - the value for the misfireChance record component
      jamChance - the value for the jamChance record component
      verticalRecoil - the value for the verticalRecoil record component
      horizontalRecoil - the value for the horizontalRecoil record component
      firearmClass - the value for the firearmClass record component
      firearmType - the value for the firearmType record component
      fireMode - the value for the fireMode record component
      disabled - the value for the disabled record component
      calibre - the value for the calibre record component

  • Method Details

    • builder

      public static FirearmStats.Builder builder()
      Creates a new FirearmStats.Builder instance for constructing a FirearmStats object.
      Returns:
      A new builder instance.

    • getCooldown

      public float getCooldown()
      Calculates the cooldown time between shots in seconds.
      Returns:
      The cooldown time in seconds.

      public FirearmStats.Builder toBuilder()
      Creates a new FirearmStats.Builder instance initialized with the values of this FirearmStats object.
      Returns:
      A new builder instance initialized with the values of this object.

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. Reference components are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object); primitive components are compared with the compare method from their corresponding wrapper classes.
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
